mood: calm, tactile, slightly uncanny, like a kitchen tool becoming a signal instrument after closing time
lighting: soft overhead kitchen light, diffused through fog, with a low stainless gleam and small burgundy edge shadows
object_inventory: one dominant oversized warm-white enamel oval carrying a cream ribbon gesture
one secondary brushed-steel pot crescent suspended near the top edge
one secondary fog-blue rectangular threshold pressed into the right side of the field
quiet source anchors as tiny slits, labels, dots, tally cuts, and grain marks
large charcoal tile negative space occupying more than half the plate
negative_constraints: no desks, dashboards, cards, shelves, cabinets, archives, or office rooms
no printmaking chapel, roller room, cipher chapel, or splatter-canvas archive
no copied faces, logos, page chrome, or literal social-media screenshots
no crowded prop inventory; keep one dominant form and two secondary forms only
preserve at least 45 percent negative space
limit the dominant visible surface language to enamel, stainless steel, and charcoal tile
no equal-weight grid of source objects
